overall.description: A cinematic drive through a futuristic industrial district in a video game (Cyberpunk 2077), starting from under a concrete overpass and proceeding along a multi-lane highway toward a distant city skyline. The scene features distinctive orange street lights, refinery towers, and modern industrial architecture under a clear blue sky with no traffic or pedestrians present.

scene_state.functional_zone: highway underpass exit transitioning to open industrial road

events.description: exits covered concrete underpass into open sunlit industrial highway
emerges from deep shadow into bright direct sunlight

agents.ego_description: driving forward out from under a concrete bridge into an open industrial highway with refinery towers visible ahead

tall metal refinery towers and power structures in the distant industrial zone
massive dark industrial building with flat roof on the left side
futuristic orange-glowing street lamp on the right side of the road

segments.scene_description: The segment begins under a dark concrete overpass, then emerges into bright sunlight revealing an expansive industrial highway. Large refinery towers dominate the distant center while a massive industrial warehouse sits on the left. The road is completely empty as the vehicle drives forward into the open industrial zone.

scene_state.functional_zone: open industrial highway with approaching overpass

events.description: vehicle begins a slight left curve along the highway

agents.ego_description: driving along the curved highway, approaching a large metal overpass structure in the distance

entered.detail: large metal truss bridge structure spanning across the highway ahead
tall concrete barrier wall on the right side of the highway

segments.scene_description: The vehicle continues along the open industrial highway, curving slightly left as it approaches a large metal overpass bridge. The industrial warehouse remains prominent on the left while concrete barriers line the right side. The refinery towers shift to the right as the vehicle progresses toward the overpass.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered highway passage under metal overpass

events.description: enters deep shadow beneath the large metal overpass bridge
exits the shadow of the overpass back into bright sunlight

agents.ego_description: driving under the large metal overpass structure with city skyscrapers becoming visible in the distance ahead

entered.detail: tall modern skyscrapers of the city skyline visible through and beyond the overpass

segments.scene_description: The vehicle passes beneath the massive metal overpass, moving through shadow with the city skyline now visible ahead. The industrial warehouse and refinery towers fall behind as the concrete walls of the underpass frame the view. Emerging from the shadow, the scene opens again to sunlight with the city towers prominently centered.

scene_state.functional_zone: open highway approach to city with roadside debris

events.description: piles of blue trash bags become visible along the left roadside

agents.ego_description: driving along the open highway toward the distant city skyline with industrial zones visible on the right

entered.detail: clusters of blue and white trash bags piled along the left side of the road
another overpass structure visible in the far distance down the highway

segments.scene_description: The vehicle continues on the open highway with the city skyline now prominent on the left side. The road is lined with piles of trash bags on the left while industrial structures remain visible on the right. Another distant overpass appears ahead as the vehicle maintains steady progress toward the urban center.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous drive from the shadows of a concrete overpass through a sprawling industrial zone toward a distant city skyline. It begins in darkness before emerging into bright sunlight on an empty highway, where a massive warehouse on the left and towering refineries in the distance define the open landscape. As the vehicle curves slightly left, the refinery towers shift to the right and the road leads directly toward a large metal overpass bridge. The scene then dips back into shadow as the camera passes beneath the bridge, framing the emerging city towers ahead before breaking once more into the light. Finally, the view opens onto a stretch of highway lined with piles of trash bags on the left and industrial structures on the right, moving steadily toward another distant overpass and the urban center.
